scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts src/server.ts src/runtime/pdfkit.ts src/runtime/jszip.ts src/runtime/ethers.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node22 --alias:@traibox/contracts=../../packages/contracts/src/index.ts --alias:@traibox/db=../../packages/db/src/index.ts --alias:@traibox/profiles=../../packages/profiles/src/index.ts --alias:@traibox/proof=../../packages/proof/src/index.ts --alias:@traibox/partner-sdk=../../packages/partner-sdk/src/index.ts --sourcemap --outbase=src --outdir=dist --out-extension:.js=.cjs
